hero.sub: Psychometric analysis of positive and negative affect with an adaptive interface that changes to match your state

how.title: How It Works
how.desc: Three simple steps to understanding your emotional state
how.step1_desc: Answer questions based on the adapted PANAS scale. Takes 1–2 minutes
how.step2_desc: The algorithm determines positive and negative affect levels with detailed metrics
how.step3_desc: The design changes to match your state — colors, shapes, and animations become personalized

demo.title: Try It Now
demo.desc: Choose your mood manually or take a test for accurate analysis
demo.question: How are you feeling right now?

happy.text: You're in a great mood! The interface has become brighter and warmer — reflecting your current state.

calm.text: Ideal state for deep work. Green tones and soft shapes help you maintain your focus.

stressed.text: Tension detected. We've activated a dark theme and muted colors to reduce visual and cognitive load.

neutral.text: A balanced state. The interface uses standard accents for comfortable and productive daily work.

quiz.title: PANAS Test
quiz.subtitle: Affect Scale
quiz.question: Question
quiz.start_desc: Answer honestly — there are no right or wrong answers. This helps the system adapt.
quiz.pdf_footer: Report generated automatically by MoodFlow. Data is confidential.

description.happy: High level of positive affect: enthusiasm and energy. Your state promotes creativity.
description.calm: A state of calm and stability. Best time for balanced and deep work.
description.neutral: Balanced state. Resources are normal, no expressed emotional swings.
description.stressed: Increased level of tension. We recommend slowing down and focusing on rest.

q1.text: How attentive and interested are you in what is happening around you right now?
q1.a1: Very — I notice details, thoughts are clear
q1.a3: A bit distracted, mind is wandering

q2.text: How would you describe your level of enthusiasm and inspiration right now?
q2.a1: I am full of inspiration and want to act
q2.a2: There is a desire, though without much of a lift
q2.a4: No inspiration at all, everything seems futile

q3.text: How physically and emotionally strong do you feel right now?
q3.a1: I feel strength and lightness in my body
q3.a3: A bit exhausted, but holding on

q4.text: How active and productive are you today?
q4.a1: Very active — I've already done a lot
q4.a4: Just want to lie down and do nothing

q5.text: How much nervousness or anxiety do you feel right now?
q5.a2: There is a slight worry, but controlled

q6.text: How do you react when something goes wrong or someone irritates you?
q6.a2: A bit upset, but calm down quickly
q6.a3: I feel irritated, hard to hold back
q6.a4: Strong anger or a sense of hopelessness

q7.text: Do you feel any distress or emotional heaviness right now?
q7.a1: No — I feel light and positive
q7.a3: There is a slight sadness or fatigue from the day

q8.text: Do you have a sense of satisfaction with yourself or your actions today?
q8.a1: Yes — I am satisfied with what I've done
q8.a2: There is a calm satisfaction without much joy

q9.text: If you could describe your overall mood in one word, it would be...
q9.a1: Happy / Inspired — full of positive energy

q10.text: How determined and confident are you in your actions today?
q10.a1: Very — I know what I want and how to achieve it
q10.a2: There is a plan, but also doubts
q10.a3: Not sure what to do next
q10.a4: Feeling confused or afraid of making a mistake

benefits.title: Why MoodFlow?
benefits.desc: We combined evidence-based psychometrics with modern design technologies
benefits.b1_desc: We use the valid PANAS scale for accurate determination of your emotional state.
benefits.b2_desc: The interface is not just a picture, but a living organism that adapts to you.
benefits.b3_desc: Every aspect of the design works for your comfort and productivity.
benefits.b4_desc: Your answers are local and anonymous. We care about your data security.

audience.title: Audience
audience.desc: MoodFlow is created for people who want to understand themselves better
audience.s1_desc: Manage stress during exams. Adapt the environment for better concentration
audience.s2_desc: Find inspiration and maintain creative flow. The environment adapts to your rhythm
audience.s3_desc: Create a comfortable workspace remotely. Increase productivity and reduce fatigue

history.title: Your Mood Dynamics
history.desc: Visualization of your affective profile based on the PANAS scale. Data is stored locally.
history.empty_main: Charts will appear here after your first test
history.empty_sub: Take the PANAS test to start tracking your results
history.chart_desc: Average values based on recent tests
history.line_desc: Changes in PA and NA levels over time

olena.text: MoodFlow helps me understand my emotional state better. Now I see patterns and can manage stress in advance. The adaptive interface is incredible!
olena.name: Elena K.

max.text: This is a lifesaver during finals! Now I can quickly track my stress level and adapt my workspace. Highly recommend to all students!
max.name: Max P.

anna.text: I didn't think design could affect productivity so much. After MoodFlow, I noticed I work 40% more efficiently in the right environment!
anna.name: Anna S.

cta.title: Try It Now
cta.desc: Feel how the interface adapts to your state. Choose a mood or take a quick test in the demo section.

footer.brand_desc: Intelligent mood analysis with an adaptive interface for a comfortable day
